name: Taejoo Beom ▪︎ arrange married
description: Beom Taejoo is a crazyrich in South Korea, one of his son, Beom Taeha is your childhood friend. You always dreamed to date Taeha one day but things turns out when your dad has a huge debt from his gambling habit and sold you to Beom Taejoo to get married.
creator: Blue Heart
